title: S + help + O + (to) V（help 用法）

formulas.zh: 主詞幫助受詞做某事（to可省略）
主詞幫忙做某事（不及物用法）
忍不住做某事（特殊用法，表被動意涵）

explanation: help後可直接接受詞加原形動詞或加to的不定詞，兩種形式意義相同。當help為及物動詞時，句型為「S + help + O + (to) V」，to可省略；當help為不及物動詞時，用「S + help + (to) V」。特殊用法「cannot help + V-ing」表示「忍不住、無法抗拒」，常用於表達被迫的反應或情感。注意此時help後跟動名詞，意思與普通用法截然不同。

examples.eng: I helped my younger brother (to) finish his homework yesterday.
examples.chi: 我昨天幫助弟弟完成作業。

examples.eng: The teacher helped the struggling student understand the difficult concept.
examples.chi: 老師幫助那位困難的學生理解這個困難的概念。

examples.eng: We all helped prepare for the upcoming school festival.
examples.chi: 我們都幫忙準備即將到來的校園慶典。

examples.eng: I cannot help laughing when I saw that funny video.
examples.chi: 當我看到那支有趣的影片時，忍不住笑了。

extension.tip: 判斷help用法的關鍵：看後面是否直接有受詞。有受詞用「help + O + (to) V」；無受詞用「help + (to) V」。「cannot help + V-ing」是固定片語，專表「忍不住」，語意上通常代表無法控制的行為反應。

examples.test: I helped him finish the project. vs. I helped finish the project.
examples.result: → 前者有受詞him，後者無受詞。兩句皆正確，只是及物與不及物的區別。

examples.test: I cannot help but laugh. vs. I cannot help laughing.
examples.result: → 兩種形式皆可接受，皆表「忍不住笑」，但cannot help + V-ing最為常用。

examples.test: 錯誤：I helped him to go there. 正確：I helped him go there.
examples.result: → 在help句型中，to可省略。省略to會更自然且更常見。

extension.note: help後有受詞時to可省；cannot help固定搭配V-ing；記住「幫助」與「忍不住」兩大用法分野。

parts: The coach helped the young athletes
exercises.sentence: The coach helped the young athletes (to) improve their skills and techniques.
exercises.translation: 教練幫助年輕運動員改進他們的技巧和技術。

parts: the classroom before the principal's visit.
exercises.sentence: We all helped (to) clean the classroom before the principal's visit.
exercises.translation: 在校長視察前，我們都幫忙打掃教室。

parts: when her favorite song plays on the radio.
exercises.sentence: She cannot help dancing when her favorite song plays on the radio.
exercises.translation: 當她最喜歡的歌曲在廣播中播放時，她忍不住跳舞。

parts: The doctor helped the elderly patient
exercises.sentence: The doctor helped the elderly patient (to) take the medication correctly.
exercises.translation: 醫生幫助老年患者正確服用藥物。
